---
title: "Instructor Only: Effective And Honest Scales Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
flu <- read_csv("data/real/flu_vaccination_age_time_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

latest_flu <- flu |>
  filter(
    month == 5,
    season_start_year == max(season_start_year, na.rm = TRUE),
    !is.na(estimate)
  ) |>
  mutate(age_group = reorder(age_group, estimate))

ggplot(latest_flu, aes(x = age_group, y = estimate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Latest Flu Vaccination Estimates By Age Group",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Estimate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
